ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination data entry */,
  "target_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target group */,
  "first_dose" INTEGER /* Number of first doses administered */,
  "second_dose" INTEGER /* Number of second doses administered */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the target group */,
  "denominator" INTEGER /* Denominator (total number of people in the target group) */,
  "year_week_iso" TEXT /* ISO week of the reporting period (e.g., 2020-W52) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine administered */,
  "vaccination_location" TEXT /* Location where the vaccination was administered */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of vaccination */,
  "additional_doses" INTEGER /* Number of additional doses administered */,
  "vaccination_status" TEXT /* Current vaccination status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_year_week_iso FOREIGN KEY ("year_week_iso") REFERENCES aggregated_data ("year_week_iso"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_target_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_group_id") REFERENCES target_groups ("target_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "target_groups" (
  "target_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target group */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the target group (e.g., Age<18, Age18_24) */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age of the target group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age of the target group */,
  "age_width" INTEGER /* Width of the age range */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "target_group_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the target group */,
  "target_group_population" INTEGER /* Initial population size of the target group */,
  "target_group_status" TEXT /* Status of the target group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_groups_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "vaccination_strategy" TEXT /* Vaccination strategy or plan for the country */,
  "vaccination_progress" TEXT /* Overall vaccination progress in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination data the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  "file_version" TEXT /* Version of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report in MB */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "report_audience" TEXT /* Intended audience for the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aggregated_data" (
  "aggregated_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aggregated data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country */,
  "year_week_iso" TEXT /* ISO week of the reporting period (e.g., 2020-W52) */,
  "total_first_dose" INTEGER /* Total number of first doses administered */,
  "total_second_dose" INTEGER /* Total number of second doses administered */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population */,
  "total_denominator" INTEGER /* Total denominator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "vaccination_rate" REAL /* Vaccination rate (percentage of the population vaccinated) */,
  "additional_metrics" TEXT /* Additional metrics or notes related to the aggregated data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aggregated_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aggregated_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aggregated_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES target_groups ("target_group_id")
)
